Title: xFrontend — pageContext Homepage Slug Resolution
Preconditions: Runner-native. Calls pageContext with storeId + empty permalink. Expects store metadata populated. No auth required.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=homepage_ctx] errors[] empty
[DATA label=homepage_ctx] data.pageContext is non-null
[DATA label=homepage_ctx] data.pageContext.store is non-null
[DATA label=homepage_ctx] data.pageContext.store.storeId is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [ROUNDTRIP label=homepage_ctx] re-execute → same store metadata returned
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; store null; storeId mismatch

Title: xFrontend — pageContext CMS Permalink Resolution
Preconditions: Runner-native. Calls pageContext with a sample permalink. Verifies slugInfo structure is present.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=search_ctx] errors[] empty
[DATA label=search_ctx] data.pageContext is non-null
[DATA label=search_ctx] data.pageContext.slugInfo is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] slugInfo.entityInfo may be populated if /search resolves to a known entity, or null if permalink is a pure route. Both acceptable.

Title: xFrontend — pageContext Store Settings in Response
Preconditions: Runner-native. Queries pageContext and asserts store.defaultLanguage + store.defaultCurrency + store.availableLanguages/Currencies are populated.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=store_settings] errors[] empty
[DATA label=store_settings] data.pageContext.store is non-null
[DATA label=store_settings] data.pageContext.store.defaultLanguage is non-null
[DATA label=store_settings] data.pageContext.store.defaultLanguage.cultureName is non-null
[DATA label=store_settings] data.pageContext.store.defaultCurrency is non-null
[DATA label=store_settings] data.pageContext.store.defaultCurrency.code is non-null
[DATA label=store_settings] data.pageContext.store.availableLanguages is non-null
[COUNT label=store_settings] data.pageContext.store.availableLanguages.length >= 1
[DATA label=store_settings] data.pageContext.store.availableCurrencies is non-null
[COUNT label=store_settings] data.pageContext.store.availableCurrencies.length >= 1
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] defaultLanguage.cultureName and defaultCurrency.code populated; availableLanguages/Currencies are non-empty lists
Failure_Signals: Schema drift on StoreResponseType (DV-009); defaultLanguage/Currency null; availableLanguages/Currencies null or empty (resolver regression)

Title: xFrontend — pageContext Authenticated vs Anonymous User Context
Preconditions: Runner-native. Calls pageContext twice — first anonymous, then authenticated. Verifies user resolution differs.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=anon_ctx] errors[] empty
[DATA label=anon_ctx] data.pageContext.user is non-null
[DATA label=anon_ctx] data.pageContext.user.memberId is null
[ERRORS label=auth_ctx] errors[] empty
[DATA label=auth_ctx] data.pageContext.user is non-null
[DATA label=auth_ctx] data.pageContext.user.id is non-null
[DATA label=auth_ctx] data.pageContext.user.memberId is non-null
[DATA label=auth_ctx] data.pageContext.user.contact.id is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] auth_ctx.user.id is a real GUID matching ORG_USER and contact.id is bound. anon_ctx.user.id may be a session-bound id (non-null is acceptable for anon session), but memberId AND contact MUST be null — this is the anonymous-vs-authenticated boundary. Verified live 2026-05-21: anon returns user with non-null id (session) + null memberId + null contact; auth returns user with real id + memberId + contact binding.
Failure_Signals: anon_ctx.user.memberId is non-null (session leak — P0 security regression: anonymous request bound to a member account); anon_ctx.user.contact non-null (same session-leak signal); auth_ctx.user.memberId is null (auth context lost — P1 regression)
References: xAPI; graphql-schema.md — PageContextResponseType.user; anon-vs-auth boundary is memberId/contact (not user.id)

Title: xFrontend — pageContext Invalid Permalink
Preconditions: Runner-native. Calls pageContext with a permalink that doesn't exist. Expects slugInfo.entityInfo=null without HTTP 500.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=bogus_ctx] errors[] empty
[DATA label=bogus_ctx] data.pageContext is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Invalid permalink → entityInfo null + store still populated. No HTTP 500 or stack trace.
Failure_Signals: HTTP 500; crash; stack trace in errors[]; entityInfo populated with arbitrary data

Title: xFrontend — pageContext Organization-Scoped White Labeling
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER queries pageContext with their organizationId. Verifies whiteLabelingSettings schema resolves (value may be null if org has no WL config).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=wl_ctx] errors[] empty
[DATA label=wl_ctx] data.pageContext is non-null
[DATA label=wl_ctx] data.pageContext.store is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] whiteLabelingSettings may be null (org has no WL config) or populated with fields. Either is acceptable for schema-coverage.

Title: xFrontend — store(domain) Bootstrap Query Returns storeId + storeUrl + settings (VCST-4642)
Preconditions: Runner-native. PUBLIC. VCST-4642: storefront fires store(domain) as first bootstrap query (InitializeApplication). Verify: (1) store query accepts domain arg; (2) returns storeId + storeUrl; (3) settings object present. Module list may be null if "expose versions" setting is disabled — acceptable; schema coverage is the gate.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=init_store] errors[] empty
[DATA label=init_store] data.store is non-null
[DATA label=init_store] data.store.storeId is non-null
[DATA label=init_store] data.store.storeUrl is non-null
[DATA label=init_store] data.store.settings is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] store.settings non-null confirms the settings resolver is present. settings.modules may be null if expose-versions setting is off — both acceptable. storeId + storeUrl non-null confirms domain→store resolution.
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; store null (domain does not resolve — env misconfiguration or domain field not wired); storeUrl null (StoreResponseType missing storeUrl); HTTP 500

Title: xFrontend — store(storeId) Bootstrap Returns Full Settings Shape Including settings.modules (VCST-4642)
Preconditions: Runner-native. PUBLIC. Full-field coverage for the store query using storeId arg (alternative bootstrap path). Verifies defaultLanguage, defaultCurrency, availableLanguages, availableCurrencies, and settings objects present. This is the bootstrap shape the storefront processes to build its feature map before pageContext.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=init_by_id] errors[] empty
[DATA label=init_by_id] data.store is non-null
[DATA label=init_by_id] data.store.storeId is non-null
[DATA label=init_by_id] data.store.storeUrl is non-null
[DATA label=init_by_id] data.store.defaultLanguage is non-null
[DATA label=init_by_id] data.store.defaultCurrency is non-null
[DATA label=init_by_id] data.store.settings is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Full store object with all bootstrap fields. settings.modules may be null if expose-versions disabled — schema field presence is the gate, not module list content.
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; store null for known storeId; defaultLanguage null; settings null (StoreSettingsType not wired); HTTP 500

Title: xFrontend — store(domain) Invalid Domain Returns null Without HTTP 500 (VCST-4642)
Preconditions: Runner-native. PUBLIC. Graceful degradation gate (BL-CROSS-011): unknown domain must return data.store=null with errors[] empty — not HTTP 500 or stack trace. When frontend receives null it falls back to storeId-based lookup. Pre-launch risk: unhandled domain-not-found exception white-screens the storefront on first load.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=bad_domain] errors[] empty
[DATA label=bad_domain] data.store is null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] data.store=null + errors[] empty confirms graceful null contract. HTTP 500 or errors[] non-empty would indicate an unhandled domain-not-found exception.
Failure_Signals: HTTP 500; errors[] non-empty with stack trace (unhandled exception — white-screens storefront); data.store non-null with wrong storeId (wrong-store resolution)

Title: xFrontend — store + pageContext Combined Bootstrap Returns Consistent storeId (VCST-4642)
Preconditions: Runner-native. PUBLIC. VCST-4642 sequence verification: storefront fires store() then pageContext(). Both must resolve consistently for same storeId. Regression gate: if store() and pageContext() return different storeIds, storefront builds split feature map. storeId match between both responses is the cross-assertion.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=store_init] errors[] empty
[DATA label=store_init] data.store.storeId is non-null
[ERRORS label=page_ctx_init] errors[] empty
[DATA label=page_ctx_init] data.pageContext is non-null
[DATA label=page_ctx_init] data.pageContext.store.storeId is non-null
[DATA label=page_ctx_init] data.pageContext.store.defaultLanguage.cultureName is non-null
[DATA label=page_ctx_init] data.pageContext.store.defaultCurrency.code is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Both queries return non-null storeId for same {{STORE_ID}}. pageContext includes defaultLanguage + defaultCurrency for i18n bootstrap. No mismatch between the two queries confirms consistent resolver.
Failure_Signals: store_init errors[] non-empty; page_ctx_init errors[] non-empty; pageContext.store storeId different from store_init storeId (routing inconsistency); HTTP 500 on either query
